search_queries_used: site:rcoa.ac.uk GPAS regional anaesthesia documentation follow-up 2025
site:asahq.org regional anesthesia documentation consent follow-up
candidate_sources_rejected: local anesthetic medicine and dose tables
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: Block choice depends on the patient, procedure, responsible anesthetist, resources, and consent.
No medicine, concentration, volume, dose, or toxicity-management output was permitted.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: Patients receiving or being assessed for regional anesthesia, with technique- and population-specific qualifications.
setting_applicability: Preprocedure, procedure, recovery, and documented follow-up within a regional-anesthesia service.
UAE_applicability: Current RCoA specialty guidance requires UAE credentialing, consent, medicine, monitoring, rescue, discharge, and facility-policy adaptation.
recency_verification: Current RCoA GPAS 2025 chapter was reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: The current 2025 RCoA GPAS regional-anesthesia chapter was used.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact RCoA recommendations support documenting regional-anesthesia suitability, preparation, completed assessment, risk discussion, consent context, and the clinician-entered record without creating a block plan.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician documentation of a regional procedure, preoperative preparation, and day-surgery suitability.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact follow-up section supports documenting an already arranged handover, follow-up, mobilization assessment, discharge process, or education; no discharge decision or instruction is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports documented follow-up systems, mobilization status, discharge information, and postoperative education without directing management.

unresolved_source_gaps: Procedure, indication, side and site, technique, consent, equipment, asepsis, monitoring, medicine, concentration, volume, dose, adjunct, aspiration, injection, ultrasound, block result, complications, intervention, recovery, mobilization, discharge, instructions, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
